ext_description.message: Submit product pages to Part-DB to quickly create electronic parts from web content.

popup_unconfigured_text.message: Part-DB URL is not configured yet.

popup_error_no_permission.message: Your Part-DB account does not have permission to use the browser plugin.

popup_error_feature_disabled.message: Browser plugin feature is disabled in Part-DB. A system administrator must enable it in the Part-DB system settings.

popup_error_cannot_access.message: Cannot access this page. Try refreshing it.

popup_error_page_too_large.message: Page is too large ($SIZE$ MB). Maximum is 5 MB.

popup_success_provider.message: Part creation form opened in a new tab!

popup_error_no_config.message: Part-DB URL is not configured. Open Settings.

popup_error_page_too_large_limit.message: Page HTML exceeds the 5 MB limit.

options_url_hint.message: The root URL of your Part-DB instance (without trailing slash).

options_locale_hint.message: Language code used in URLs (e.g. en, de, fr). Check your Part-DB URL to find your locale. Defaults to en.

options_error_no_url.message: Please enter a Part-DB URL first.

options_error_not_logged_in.message: Part-DB is reachable, but you are not logged in (HTTP $CODE$). Open Part-DB and log in, then try again.

options_success_connection.message: Connection successful! Part-DB is reachable at $URL$

options_error_unexpected_response.message: Unexpected response: HTTP $CODE$. Check your URL and locale.

options_error_cannot_reach.message: Could not reach Part-DB: $ERROR$. Check the URL and ensure Part-DB is running.
